g.text: 3D Data Quality Framework \u00b7 Schema Change Handler
Schema Change Detector \u2192 Rule Impact Analysis \u2192 Owner Notification \u2192 Rule Triage \u2192 Resolution
Schema Change Detector runs on schedule (every 6 hours)
AND on-event (UC ALTER TABLE / DROP COLUMN event hook).
\u2022 Data type changed \u2022 Table renamed / dropped
BROKEN -- rule directly references changed element
AT_RISK -- rule references same table; column_name
UNAFFECTED-- rule on same table but different column
can re-enable after fix without incident ticket).
Email + Jira ticket per affected owner:
Subject: "Action required -- schema change affects your DQ rules"
\u2022 [AT_RISK] DQ_20260312_009 completeness check on same table
SLA to fix BROKEN rules: 48 hours
"Show me rules broken by schema change on gold.customer"
Show impact summary with guided repair options:
Option B -- Manually edit rule SQL
Option C -- Retire rule (no longer needed)
[Validation fails (e.g. new column has different type)]
Edit rule SQL or metadata manually
(same flow as rule creation WRITE path)
"Retire rule DQ_20260601_001 -- column no longer exists"
[SCH-5] SLA Enforcement for Unresolved Broken Rules
Rule Maintenance Job monitors BROKEN rules for SLA compliance:
\u2502 +48 hrs \u2192 Escalate to Tech Lead + DataOps \u2502
All escalations + auto-archive actions logged to rule_audit_log.
